description_long: This object is a round manhole cover set within a decorative circular frame, featuring a woven basket-like central pattern and an ornate border with intricate motifs. The cover appears to be made of heavy metal, likely cast iron, and is flush with the surrounding pavement. The surface is dark gray with a slightly weathered finish, and the border displays a repeating floral or vine design. The central area is flat and textured, providing grip for pedestrians or vehicles. There are no visible inscriptions, bolts, or manufacturer logos on the surface, and the cover is designed to be both functional and visually integrated with urban streetscapes.
description: A round, dark gray manhole cover with a woven central pattern and ornate border, set flush in decorative pavement. The surface is textured and metallic, blending function with urban design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full circular manhole cover with its woven pattern and ornate border clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness of the cover and the raised edge of the decorative border.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the manhole cover, emphasizing the symmetry of the woven and border patterns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the profile of the cover and the continuity of the ornate border.
attribute_pattern_design: Central woven basket-like grid with an ornate floral or vine motif border; overall circular geometric design.
